# defectdojo_test (Resource)

DefectDojo Test

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "defectdojo_test" "example" {
  test_type    = 1
  engagement   = 1
  target_start = "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z"
  target_end   = "2025-01-31T23:59:59Z"
  title        = "SAST Scan"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `engagement` (Number) ID of the Engagement this Test belongs to
- `target_end` (String) End datetime of the Test (RFC3339 format, e.g. 2006-01-02T15:04:05Z)
- `target_start` (String) Start datetime of the Test (RFC3339 format, e.g. 2006-01-02T15:04:05Z)
- `test_type` (Number) ID of the Test Type

### Optional

- `branch_tag` (String) Tag or branch that was tested
- `build_id` (String) Build ID that was tested
- `commit_hash` (String) Commit hash tested
- `description` (String) Description of the Test
- `environment` (Number) ID of the environment
- `lead` (Number) ID of the lead user
- `percent_complete` (Number) Percentage of test completion
- `scan_type` (String) Type of scan
- `tags` (Set of String) Tags for this Test
- `title` (String) Title of the Test
- `version` (String) Version tested

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier
